pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 13, 18 - PROJECT_DIR variable set to /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/DevTools and used for project creation
setup_task.sh line 14 defines PACKAGE_DIR, and export_result.sh line 8 references SERVICE_FILE with this exact path structure
setup_task.sh line 86 creates AndroidManifest.xml at app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml
setup_task.sh: line 66 (namespace), line 70 (applicationId), line 137 (package declaration in MainActivity.kt)
export_result.sh line 8 references DemoModeTileService, verifier.py line 54 checks for this class name
Official Android documentation: https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/views/quicksettings-tiles - This is the required permission for Quick Settings tile services
Official Android documentation: https://developer.android.com/reference/android/service/quicksettings/TileService - This is the action constant for Quick Settings tiles (added in API 24)

privileged_info_summary: The task implements a Quick Settings Tile for an Android app using the TileService API (minimum API level 24). All metadata values are verified as correct: the project is created in /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/DevTools with package com.example.devtools; the service class DemoModeTileService must be registered in AndroidManifest.xml with permission android.permission.BIND_QUICK_SETTINGS_TILE and intent-filter action android.service.quicksettings.action.QS_TILE. The implementation requires overriding onClick() to toggle demo mode preferences and onStartListening() to sync tile state. All data is synthetically generated by the setup script rather than from external sources.
